slides.title: Your brain stays sharp when you *keep learning*.
slides.sub: Mentally challenging activity builds a buffer that helps the brain resist age-related decline.

slides.title: Build cognitive reserve
slides.body: Challenging mental activity is thought to build *cognitive reserve*, a buffer the brain can draw on later in life.

slides.title: A buffer against decline
slides.body: That reserve is linked to *better resistance* to age-related decline, helping the mind cope as the brain changes.

slides.title: Learn something new
slides.body: Pick up a language, an instrument or a real skill. *New and effortful* matters more than easy and familiar.

slides.title: Novelty beats autopilot
slides.body: Routine asks little of the brain. Keep it *slightly hard*, because the stretch is where the benefit lives.

slides.title: Pair it with people
slides.body: Learning alongside *social and physical activity* appears to compound the benefit, so combine them when you can.

slides.title: Keep your mind *in training*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your sleep, food, movement and steps into one calm daily score and a simple plan for tomorrow.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
A sharp mind isn't only luck. Challenging your brain builds cognitive reserve, a buffer that helps it resist age-related decline. 🧠

Learn something new and effortful, a language, an instrument, a skill, keep it slightly hard, and pair it with people and movement. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your daily habits into one calm score and a plan for tomorrow → link in bio.
youtube_title: Keep Learning to Protect Your Aging Brain
